holes.content: For magic-angle twisted bilayer graphene near the first magic angle, the selected LKM chain treats transport at nominal half-filling of the flat moire band, n=+-n_s/2, that shows resistance increasing on cooling over roughly 1-4 K as phenomenology consistent with a correlated, Mott-like insulating state driven by electron-electron interactions, while noting that this does not by itself prove a microscopic Mott mechanism [@Cao2018].
holes.label: gcn_ffd6d31f_correlated_insulator_phenomenology
